issues.description: Action type is 'ReturnToHand' but effect text says 'Place at bottom of deck'. Should be 'SearchDeck' or similar deck placement action, not hand return.

Target scope is 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' but effect text says 'up to 1 Character' with no player restriction specified. Should be 'ChooseCharacter' (player's own characters) or clarify if opponent's.
